extraction.one_line_summary: TEUNISSEN Mike won bunch sprint after BORA forced pace at 75km causing VIVIANI puncture, then GROENEWEGEN crashed 1.5km out.
tactical_patterns: BORA accelerated at 75km on Pave Tim section to split peloton, allowing SAGAN uncontested intermediate sprint points.
VAN AVERMAET took breakaway KOM solely for polka dot jersey then immediately abandoned effort, pure jersey hunting.
TEUNISSEN as GROENEWEGEN's leadout man launched sprint 250m out when leader crashed, opportunistic role reversal success.

rider_signals.TEUNISSEN Mike: positive: leadout man won stage after leading out early at 250m, suggests underestimated finishing speed
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: caught out by BORA's 75km pave acceleration with puncture, positioning vulnerability revealed
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: crashed 1.5km out as stage favorite, lost opportunity despite team controlling
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: BORA's strategic acceleration secured uncontested intermediate sprint points, proactive green jersey tactics
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: neutral: boxed in final sprint despite 3rd place, positioning issue cost potential victory
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: crashed 18km out with facial injuries but rejoined, early Tour vulnerability signal
